Metadata.title: MemberFlow — Modern Membership Management for Organizations
Metadata.description: MemberFlow helps community organizations manage members, families, contributions, events, and more — all in one place.

Hero.subtitle: MemberFlow is the all-in-one platform for community organizations to manage members, families, contributions, events, and more.
Hero.socialProof: Organizations are already growing with MemberFlow

Features.title: Everything your community needs
Features.subtitle: From daily member management to annual events, MemberFlow covers the full lifecycle of community administration.

memberManagement.title: Member Management
memberManagement.description: Keep a complete profile for every member — personal details, contact info, membership status, ID documents, and more.

familyGenealogy.title: Family & Genealogy
familyGenealogy.description: Map family relationships with interactive family trees. Visualize multi-generational connections at a glance.

contributionsFinance.title: Contributions & Finance
contributionsFinance.description: Track donations, membership fees, and financial groups. Generate payment receipts and export reports instantly.

eventManagement.title: Event Management
eventManagement.description: Create events for fundraisers, community gatherings, and more. Track registrations, categories, and resource distribution.

multiTenancy.title: Multi-Tenancy
multiTenancy.description: One platform, many organizations. Each community gets its own isolated space with custom branding and settings.

rolesPermissions.title: Roles & Permissions
rolesPermissions.description: Granular access control with custom roles. Assign Admin, Treasurer, Manager, or Member roles with specific module-level permissions.

multilingual.title: Multilingual
multilingual.description: Built-in support for English and Dutch, with an extensible language system. Serve your community in their preferred language.

reportsExport.title: Reports & Export
reportsExport.description: Generate Excel and PDF reports for members, contributions, distributions, and more. Download or share in one click.

Pricing.title: Simple, transparent pricing
Pricing.subtitle: Start free and scale as your community grows. No hidden fees.

Testimonials.title: What customers can do with MemberFlow
Testimonials.subtitle: Practical ways organizations use MemberFlow to save time, stay organized, and scale operations.

card1.title: Centralize member records
card1.description: Keep profiles, households, roles, and notes in one searchable place so teams spend less time on admin and more time serving people.
card1.highlight: One source of truth for member data

card2.title: Track contributions and finances
card2.description: Record donations, issue receipts, and monitor trends with clear dashboards that help leadership plan confidently.

card3.title: Run events with less stress
card3.description: Plan events, manage registrations, and follow distribution workflows in real time so execution stays organized from start to finish.

card4.title: Control access with permissions
card4.description: Assign roles, protect sensitive data, and give each team member the exact access they need across locations and departments.

CTA.subtitle: Join hundreds of organizations already using MemberFlow. Get started in minutes — no credit card required.

Contact.title: Contact Us
Contact.intro: Have a question, need a demo, or want to discuss Enterprise pricing? We'd love to hear from you.

Footer.tagline: Modern membership management for community organizations.
